42.reason: This line incorrectly assigns line[i] to a new slot even when a match is found later in the loop, causing duplicate entries and incorrect chain tracking.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  This line incorrectly assigns line[i] to a new slot even when a match is found later in the loop, causing duplicate entries and incorrect chain tracking.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  This line incorrectly assigns line[i] to a new slot even when a match is found later in the loop, causing duplicate entries and breaking the chain logic.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  [This incorrectly overwrites line[time+1] for every non-matching j, and may corrupt data.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [should only be assigned after the inner loop if no match found, not for every non-matching j]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  This logic is flawed. It attempts to add the current segment 'i' as a new chain inside the loop over existing chains 'j'. This means it might try to add 'i' multiple times or at the wrong time. More critically, if 'i' doesn't match 'j', it immediately overwrites line[time+1]. If 'i' matches a later 'j', the previous overwrite was wasted or incorrect. The addition of a new segment should only happen after checking ALL existing chains (j from 0 to time) and finding no match.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This assignment overwrites line[time+1] repeatedly in the inner loop, even when a match is found later. It should only add line[i] as a new chain if no match is found after checking all existing chains.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This assignment overwrites potential future segments and is executed even when a match might be found later in the inner loop. It should only happen if no match is found after checking all current chains.]
